economic_notes: Nation holds equity interests in Wasaya Group of Companies (8% holding company, 7% partnership), and Happy Time Real Estate Holdings LP (16.66%) for AVID-FN Motel One LP in Thunder Bay. Investments accounted for using modified equity method. Liquidity risk noted as cash and receivables insufficient to cover payables and deferred revenue.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2023. Nation is in Ontario. Consolidated entity includes 9 program departments plus 3 equity-method GBEs (Wasaya Group 8%, Wasaya Partnership 7%, Happy Time Real Estate LP 16.66%). Large construction in progress of $63.4M primarily for school project ($53.7M). Nation adopted PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations and PS 3450 Financial Instruments on April 1, 2022 with no significant impact. Deferred revenue is very large at $41.6M relative to total revenue. No schedule of remuneration was included in the provided text. Net debt position of ($951,054). KI Agreement Initial Start-up receivable of $2.5M noted. Annual debt service reflects only CMHC mortgage repayments as John Deere loans were newly acquired in 2023.
